svg.text: producers → outcome inference → cluster · fingerprint → Forge distill → Sentinel scan → skills collection (lifecycle) → HITL Inbox → harness install → outcomes loop back
② OUTCOME INFERENCE — six free signals (no memclaw_evolve required)

g.text: outcome_inference/ (§6, 6 signals → labels each session-trace success/failure)
git / PR / CI tied to run_id

svg.text: ③ FORGE — cluster · fingerprint · distill · scan
④ SKILLS COLLECTION — same table, source discriminator, status lifecycle (§3, §5)

g.text: jsonb (`data`) holds: name · slug · version · kind · source · status · description · content · cites · scan · target.target_content_hash · …
hash-binding: target.target_content_hash bound at staged · mismatch on apply → stale (§3, §5)
filter: status=staged AND source IN (forge, agent)
BEFORE any apply mutates a target

svg.text: direct skill writes via memclaw_doc — same lifecycle, source=agent
all phases gated by §15 acceptance criteria · Phase-0 prereq for everything · v0.1 demo lights every box end-to-end
